LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS HEMAS, LLC AND GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION DBA MINI OF SAN FRANCISCO AMENDED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO MAINTAIN ITS BURDEN OF PRODUCTION. DEFENDANT FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT THE SIDEWALK IS PART OF THE STATE HIGHWAY SYSTEM AND THAT IT CANNOT BE LIABLE PURSUANT TO SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS CODE SEC. 706. IN ADDITION, THE DECLARATION OF BRUCE STORRS CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT REGARDING WHETHER THE SIDEWALK IS CITY PROPERTY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Notice Of Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

DEFENDANTS HEMAS, LLC AND GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION DBA MINI OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is taken off calendar as a duplicate entry. (302/EHG)

Amended Notice Of Defendants Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. SVETLANA M. SHIRINOVA, Tel No. (415) 947-0703 appearing for Plaintiff Dina Sergeyeva;
Atty. MARISSA NEBENZAHL SINHA of Law Office of McDowell Shaw & Garcia APLC, Tel No. (925) 210-1300 appearing for Defendant Hemas LLC and German Motors Corporation dba Mini of San Francisco.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS HEMAS, LLC AND GERMAN MOTORS CORPORATION DBA MINI OF SAN FRANCISCO Amended Motion For Summary Judgment is denied. Defendant failed to maintain its burden of production. Defendant fails to establish that the sidewalk is part of the state highway system and that it cannot be liable pursuant to San Francisco Public Works Code sec. 706. In addition, the declaration of Bruce Storrs creates a triable issue of material fact regarding whether the sidewalk is city property. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
